Operation 'cancelBoleto' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, not_actionable. Original summary uses slash notation which is unclear. Description lacks critical details about what parameter is needed (token), what is returned, and the side effects of cancellation. Added specificity about the token parameter, return value, and state changes for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Cancels the boleto at the bank
data.description_suggestion: Cancels a boleto registration at the bank, preventing further payment processing. Requires the boleto token as a path parameter. This operation marks the boleto as cancelled in the banking system and returns the updated boleto status. Once cancelled, the boleto cannot be paid and will no longer be accepted by the bank.
data.reasoning: Original summary uses slash notation which is unclear. Description lacks critical details about what parameter is needed (token), what is returned, and the side effects of cancellation. Added specificity about the token parameter, return value, and state changes for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'createCarne' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary lacks clarity about what a carnê is. Description is incomplete - missing information about input requirements (CarneRequest schema), what is returned, and how to access the generated carnê. Enhanced with schema reference and return value details for AI agent clarity.

data.current_description: Creates multiple boletos with 3 per page layout. Perfect for installments and monthly payments.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a carnê (installment payment booklet) containing multiple boletos formatted with 3 boletos per page. Accepts a CarneRequest object specifying the boletos to include. Ideal for installment plans and recurring monthly payments. Returns the created carnê with all generated boleto details and download information.
data.reasoning: Summary lacks clarity about what a carnê is. Description is incomplete - missing information about input requirements (CarneRequest schema), what is returned, and how to access the generated carnê. Enhanced with schema reference and return value details for AI agent clarity.

message: Operation 'batchCreateBoletos' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is too generic ('Batch Create'). Description lacks input details (what format/schema), output details (what is returned), and side effects (automatic bank registration). Added clarity about batch size limit, input format, return value structure, and automatic registration behavior.

data.current_description: Issues up to 300 boletos in a single request with 1 per page layout
data.summary_suggestion: Create up to 300 boletos in batch
data.description_suggestion: Issues up to 300 boletos in a single batch request, each formatted with 1 boleto per page. Accepts an array of boleto specifications in the request body. Returns an array of created boletos with their registration details, tokens, and payment information. All boletos are automatically registered at the bank upon successful creation.
data.reasoning: Summary is too generic ('Batch Create'). Description lacks input details (what format/schema), output details (what is returned), and side effects (automatic bank registration). Added clarity about batch size limit, input format, return value structure, and automatic registration behavior.

data.current_description: Generate remittance files in CNAB 240 and 400 format
data.description_suggestion: Generates a remittance file in CNAB 240 or CNAB 400 format for submitting boletos to the bank. Accepts boleto data and format specification in the request. Returns the generated CNAB file ready for bank submission. The remittance file contains all boleto registration instructions and must be submitted to the bank to officially register the boletos in the banking system.

data.current_description: Process return files in CNAB 240 and 400 format
data.summary_suggestion: Process CNAB return file from bank

Accepts the CNAB return file in the request body. Parses the file and returns structured payment status data for each boleto, including payment confirmations, rejections, and adjustments. Updates boleto statuses in the system based on bank feedback.
